# GitHub automation assets

This folder stores Copilot and repository automation assets used to speed up
maintenance of the SharePoint API project.

## Contents

- agents/: specialized agents for architecture, security and workflow tasks
- collections/: curated bundles of prompts/instructions for repeatable tasks
- instructions/: coding standards and operational constraints
- prompts/: reusable prompts for structured output generation
- skills/: scoped capabilities used by custom agents

## Purpose

- improve consistency in PRs and code reviews
- reduce onboarding time for contributors
- capture reusable operational knowledge for this repository
